nasb.text: The pains of childbirth come upon him; He is not a wise son, For it is not the time that he should delay at the opening of the womb.

esv.text: The pangs of childbirth come for him, but he is an unwise son, for at the right time he does not present himself at the opening of the womb.

cnv.text: 生產的疼痛要臨到他身上， 他卻是沒有智慧的人， 因為產期到了，他還遲延不破胎而出。

ccb.text: 临产的阵痛要临到他， 但他是毫无智慧的孩子， 分娩之时却不离开母腹。
